title: Unlock Non-QM Opportunities: Asset Depletion Spotlight
subtitle: Discover how to leverage Non-QM Asset Depletion loans amidst changing market dynamics and Gen Z's growing market share.
keyTakeaways: Identify clients with substantial liquid assets but high DTI.
Use 36- or 60-month lookback for asset depletion calculations.
Prepare comprehensive documentation including CPA verifications.
Revisit denied applications due to DTI for potential Non-QM solutions.
Utilize PRO Portal to price scenarios and manage loan pipelines.

sections.heading: Understanding Asset Depletion Loans
sections.body: Non-QM Asset Depletion loans offer a path for clients who are asset-rich but may not meet traditional income requirements. With treasury yields currently dipping, this option becomes even more attractive.
bullets: Ideal for clients with inadequate income documentation.
Use liquid assets like IRAs, 401(k)s, or brokerage accounts.

sections.heading: Action Steps for Structuring Asset Depletion Loans
sections.body: To capitalize on this opportunity, start by identifying potential clients within your pipeline. Proper documentation is crucial for success.
bullets: Ensure CPA letters or financial statements are prepared.
Calculate asset depletion using a 36- or 60-month period.

sections.heading: Leveraging PRO Portal for Loan Management
sections.body: Maximize efficiency by utilizing the PRO Portal for pricing and managing your Non-QM loans. It streamlines the process from origination to closure.
bullets: Log into PRO Portal to price scenarios.
Manage your pipeline and track loan conditions effectively.

metaDescription: Explore asset depletion loans as treasury yields dip. Learn to structure Non-QM loans for asset-rich, income-light clients.
